# alignCenter(_:)

**Instance Method**

An action method that applies center alignment to selected content or all content if there’s no selection.

## Declaration

```swift
@MainActor func alignCenter(_ sender: Any?)
```

## Parameters

- **sender**: The object that sent this message.

## Content Alignment Action Methods

- **alignJustified(_:)**: An action method that applies full justification to selected content or all content if there’s no selection.
- **alignLeft(_:)**: An action method that applies left justification to selected content or all content if there’s no selection.
- **alignRight(_:)**: An action method that applies right justification to selected content or all content if there is no selection.
